name: Vulhub-Gitea-1.4-rce
isolation_note: Vulhub gitea/1.4-rce (Gitea 1.4.0, installed sqlite), bound to 127.0.0.1:8091 only. Owned, disposable local lab.

eta_recipes.auth_attempt: bash -c 'C=$(curl -s -c /tmp/g.jar "{target}/user/sign_up" | grep -oP "name=._csrf. (content|value)=.\\K[^\"]+" | head -1); curl -s -b /tmp/g.jar -i "{target}/user/sign_up" --data-urlencode "_csrf=$C" --data "user_name=labtester&email=lab@example.com&password=LabPass123!&retype=LabPass123!" | grep -qiE "location: /($|user)" && echo "logged in: gitea account dashboard created"'

rationale: Gitea 1.4.0 — self-advertising (Gitea). Installed via the setup wizard. AUTH/RECON box: the 1.4 RCE is a MULTI-STEP authenticated git-hook injection (login -> repo -> pre-receive hook -> push) that does not fit a single η command; the wired auth_attempt registers an account (CSRF-chained) as an auth milestone. Goal not reachable single-curl. A contrast case for the 7-dim metrics.
